channel.title: Lists-of-Stuff-I-Have on smpaget blog
channel.description: Recent content in Lists-of-Stuff-I-Have on smpaget blog

item.title: New Music
item.description:
It has been a while so just for reference purposes, here is a list of new music aquired recently by me over the last four month or so. My Brightest Diamond - Tear it Down (album cover pictured above.)
Bright Eyes - Cassadaga
Various artists - The Best Dance Album in The World Ever
LCD Soundsystem - Sound of Silver
Ferry Corsten - Right of Way
Air - Pocket Symphony
Barenaked Ladies - Live, Glasgow 09 04 07
Barenaked Ladies - Are Men
The Orb - Adventures Beyond Ultraworld
Modest Mouse - We Were Dead Before the Ship Even Sank
Aqua Lung - Memory Man
Various Artists - 101 80’s Hits
Various Artists - SxSw 07 Downloads
Various Artists - True Nineties
Various Artists - Access All Areas - Positiva sampler
Iain Archer - Magnetic North
Arcade Fire - Magenetic North
The Monroe Calculator Company - Opportunity! The Monroe Years
The Monroe Calculator Company - It’s A Brand New Ball Game
the Apples In Stereo - New Magnetic WOnder
VanDyke Parks - Song Cycle oh and specoil metniton goes to the dodgy MP3 verson of Dan Le Sac and Scroobius Pip’s great song Thou Shall Kill. Trust me all the cool kids will be into it soon.
